parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (p."IdPac")
  p."IdPac", p."Nombre", p."Apellidos",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") AS telefono,
  MAX(c."Fecha") AS ultima_higiene
FROM "Pacientes" p
INNER JOIN "DCitas" c ON c."IdPac" = p."IdPac"
WHERE c."Texto" ILIKE '%higiene%'
  AND c."IdSitC" = 5
  AND c."Fecha" BETWEEN {{ $json.desde }} AND {{ $json.hasta }}
  AND p."IdPac" NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2."IdPac" FROM "DCitas" c2
    WHERE c2."Fecha" > {{ $json.hasta }} AND c2."IdSitC" NOT IN (3,4)
  )
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") IS NOT NULL
  AND (p."AceptaWhatsApp" = true OR p."AceptaWhatsApp" IS NULL)
  AND p."Inactivo" IS NULL
GROUP BY p."IdPac", p."Nombre", p."Apellidos", p."TelMovil", p."Tel1"
LIMIT 30
